title: HotelPro 1600w Hotel B&B Hair Dryer - 3 Heat Settings - 2 Speed Settings - Concentrator Nozzle - Hang Up Loop - Safety Cut-Off - White - H1313WH
features: POWERFUL: The LLOYTRON 1600w Hair Dryer can be used to style all different types of hair, from short and curly to long and sculptured, with 2 speed settings to choose from to best suit your hair type.
2 SPEED SETTINGS AND 2 HEAT SETTINGS: This hairdryer delivers max 1600w output with 2 fan speed settings and 3 airflow heat settings.
CONCENTRATOR NOZZLE ATTACHMENT: The removable concentrator nozzle attachment helps to focus the hot air to a more concentrated target of hair

DESIGNED FOR HOTEL USE: This hair dryer is fitted with a special trigger on/off deadmans switch which must be continually pressed during use and a thermal cut-out safety device to protect you from the device over heating. This gives added safety and prevents your clients from accidentally leaving switched on in the hotel or B&B room.
QUIET DC MOTOR: This DC motor creates a quieter and lighter hair dryer.
description: Product Description The LLOYTRON 1600w Basic Hair Dryer has been designed for Hotel use with safety in mind. It has a deadmans on/off power switch and other safety features to keep your guests and Hotel safe, plus basic instructions printed on the side of the hairdryer so your client knows how to use. It is a quiet yet powerful Hairdryer and suits all different hair types. Pick from 2 fan speed setting and 3 heat settings, it can be tailored to you. Simply plug in to the mains power and set the temperature and heat to your desired settings. Tailor your experience with a concentrated nozzle, helping to focus the hot air to a more concentrated target of hair. With a hanging loop, it is easy to store. This Hairdryer also has a quiet DC motor operation to help reduce noise pollution, yet still has 1600w power. Box Includes: LLOYTRON 1600w Hair Dryer Narrow Concentrator Nozzle Instruction Manual Directions Press the on/off button continuously during use Safety Warning Special trigger on/off deadmans switch and thermal cut-out safety device for hotel use. See more
